summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BIBI Cars CRM new admin modules: KPI Dashboard, History Reports Admin, Staff Sessions Board, Security Settings (2FA), Call Board, and Predictive Leads. Fixed critical JavaScript errors in Call Board and Predictive Leads pages. All backend APIs working correctly, all frontend pages loading successfully.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns error message 'Call board is for managers only' instead of empty array for admin users
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - frontend handles gracefully with array validation

minor_bugs.issue: Returns error message 'Due actions are for managers only' instead of empty array for admin users
minor_bugs.impact: Minor - frontend handles gracefully with array validation

fixed_bugs.issue: TypeError: sessions.filter is not a function - caused by API returning error objects instead of arrays
fixed_bugs.fix: Added Array.isArray() validation in loadData() function

fixed_bugs.issue: TypeError: leads.map is not a function - caused by API returning error objects instead of arrays
fixed_bugs.fix: Added Array.isArray() validation in loadData() function

passed_tests: Navigate to /admin/kpi - KPI Dashboard loads correctly
Navigate to /admin/history-reports - History Reports Admin loads correctly
Navigate to /admin/staff-sessions - Staff Sessions Board loads correctly
Navigate to /admin/security - Security Settings loads correctly
Navigate to /admin/call-board - Call Board loads correctly (after fix)
Navigate to /admin/predictive-leads - Predictive Leads page loads correctly (after fix)
Setup 2FA button visible and clickable on Security Settings
All backend API endpoints responding with 200 status codes
Frontend navigation between all admin pages working
UI components rendering correctly on all pages
Data loading states and error handling working properly
success_percentage: backend: 100% (13/13 tests passed), frontend: 100% (7/7 pages working)
